categories.name: decision
categories.description: an architectural or process decision, its rationale, and alternatives weighed

categories.name: discovery
categories.description: a non-obvious fact learned about the codebase, a tool, or an external system

categories.name: milestone
categories.description: a completed unit of work worth recording (a merged PR, a shipped feature, a deploy)

categories.name: context
categories.description: durable background about a project, goal, or constraint not derivable from the code

categories.name: research
categories.description: distilled findings from external research (docs, articles, specs) worth caching

categories.name: lesson
categories.description: a reusable rule or pattern learned from experience, applicable to future work

categories.name: violation
categories.description: a recorded instance of a behavioral pattern being broken, for strike counting and recall

categories.name: workflow.lifecycle
categories.description: an event-plane record emitted by the behavior-pattern workflow layer (review threads, gate state)

categories.name: workplan
categories.description: an active work queue with prioritized items, superseded via revision chains as priorities change

categories.name: temporary
categories.description: transient working episodes: review threads, scratch context
